name: Sarah
message: Happy 30th birthday! I am so grateful for all the memories, laughs, and chaos we have shared over the years.

name: Mom
message: Watching you grow into the person you are today has been one of the greatest joys of my life. I love you so much.

name: Carlos
message: Thirty looks good on you. Wishing you a year full of happiness, adventure, and unforgettable memories.
